sub_delivery_id.description: CANONICAL destination pointer: the SubDelivery this member delivers to. Must resolve to an active SubDelivery whose parent Delivery is active and belongs to this member's buyer, else the member is CONFIG_INVALID and ineligible.

destination_id.description: DEPRECATED (compatibility only): legacy LeadByteConnector/ApiConnector id. Superseded by sub_delivery_id as the canonical destination. Retained additively for existing records; do not use for new members.

destination_name.description: Optional operator-facing display name for this destination member. Nullable.

alias.description: Optional short alias for this destination member. Nullable.

priority.description: Priority ranking within the group (lower wins)

reserve_price.description: Minimum acceptable price for this member

fixed_price.description: Price used when price_mode is fixed

payout_type.description: Payout basis for this destination. Nullable.

conditional_pricing_enabled.description: When true, conditional pricing rules apply on top of the base per-lead amount.

budget_caps.description: JSON: daily/weekly/monthly/total budget (spend) limits for this destination. Nullable.

kpi_metrics.description: JSON: KPI targets for this destination, e.g. {"target_cpa": 45}. Nullable.

transforms.description: JSON array of field transform rules (value map rules) applied for this destination. Nullable.

ping_config.description: JSON: ping URL, format, timeout, headers, ping body template, response parsing (accept field/operator/value), real-time price toggle for this destination. Nullable.

delivery_config.description: JSON: delivery method (webhook/email/google_sheet/ghl/sms), endpoint URL, format, timeout, headers, post body template for this destination. Nullable.

integration_complete.description: Operator marker that this destination's integration has been reviewed and activated. Nullable.

suppression_list_id.description: Suppression list applied to this member

pause_reason.description: Reason this member is paused, if any
